description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a white brick exterior and large, rectangular wooden-framed windows. The structure features a prominent balcony with a white balustrade, accessible from the upper floor, and a spacious outdoor patio area with seating and a large umbrella. The house has a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, emphasizing straight lines and right angles. The main entryway is located on the ground floor, opening onto a stone path that leads through a manicured lawn bordered by hedges. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story white brick house with large wooden-framed windows, a flat roof, balcony, and a landscaped patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, balcony, and the landscaped patio with seating and umbrella.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper balcony, multiple windows, and the solid white brick facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, a large glass door, and the continuation of the patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the main entryway, stone path, and a clear view of the outdoor seating area and umbrella.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a wooden door, stone path, and no porch or overhang, leading directly to the landscaped patio.
